universalEdges.evidence: Bid packages are issued for every trade scope on a project
Bid packages define material quantities for every category
Bid packages can incorporate rental costs for any equipment
Prequalification screens every trade for competency before bidding
RFQs evaluate experience for every specialty trade
RFPs request pricing on any material or equipment category
RFPs solicit proposals from any specialty trade
Bids include labor rates for any trade
Bids provide unit pricing for any material
Bid evaluations compare proposals across any trade
Bid leveling normalizes pricing across bidders for any material
Award notices authorize any trade to mobilize
Award notices trigger procurement of any long-lead material
Subcontracts commit every trade discipline on the project
Purchase orders schedule fabrication and delivery of any material
Purchase orders arrange rental for any equipment type
Scope of work sections describe installation requirements for any trade
Scope of work enumerates fixtures and quantities for any material
General conditions regulate work hours for every trade
General conditions govern on-site storage of any material
Retainage terms apply to every trade's progress payments
LD clauses can penalize any critical-path trade
Performance bonds guarantee completion by any subcontracted trade
Payment bonds protect suppliers of any material furnished to the project
Warranties guarantee performance of every installed material
Warranties certify workmanship by every trade
Builder's risk insures against damage to any installed material
Closeout documents collect submittals and warranties for every material
Prevailing wage applies to every trade on public projects
Allowances can reserve budget for any material category
Change order rate measured for any material
Change order rate measured for any trade
Subcontractor retention rate measured for any trade
Bid coverage measured for any trade scope
Bidder count tracked for any trade scope package
Award cycle time benchmarked for any long-lead material
Award cycle time benchmarked for any trade award process

verbGlossary.SPECIFIES QUANTITIES OF: {source} defines exact {target} quantities bidders must price against
verbGlossary.INCLUDES RENTAL OF: {source} incorporates {target} rental costs within the solicited scope
verbGlossary.VERIFIES COMPETENCY OF: {source} confirms {target} meets minimum skill and certification standards
verbGlossary.VETS EXPERIENCE OF: {target} evaluates {source}'s past project experience and capability
verbGlossary.CONFIRMS FLEET CAPACITY FOR: {target} verifies {source} controls adequate equipment to perform the work
verbGlossary.REQUESTS PRICING ON: {source} asks suppliers to submit pricing for {target}
verbGlossary.PRICES LABOR FOR: {source} includes hourly or unit labor rates for {target}
verbGlossary.ITEMIZES TONNAGE OF: {source} breaks out {target} quantities by weight for tonnage-based pricing
verbGlossary.COMPARES RATES FOR: {source} analyzes competing labor rate proposals for {target}
verbGlossary.LEVELS PRICING ON: {source} normalizes {target} pricing across bidders for comparison
verbGlossary.AUTHORIZES MOBILIZATION OF: {source} permits {target} crew to begin mobilization and site setup
verbGlossary.RELEASES PROCUREMENT OF: {source} triggers release of purchase orders for {target}
verbGlossary.CONTRACTS LABOR OF: {source} formally commits {target}'s workforce for defined scope
verbGlossary.SCHEDULES FABRICATION OF: {target} sets fabrication milestones and delivery dates for {source}
verbGlossary.ENUMERATES FIXTURES IN: {target} provides fixture schedule and count for {source} package
verbGlossary.REGULATES HOURS OF: {source} limits allowable work hours and shift schedules for {target}
verbGlossary.GOVERNS STORAGE OF: {source} dictates staging areas and on-site storage for {target}
verbGlossary.RESERVES BUDGET FOR: {target} sets aside a provisional dollar amount for {source} category
verbGlossary.WITHHOLDS AGAINST WORK OF: {source} authorizes withholding a percentage of {target} progress payments
verbGlossary.PENALIZES DELAY BY: {target} charges penalties when {source} causes schedule overrun on the critical path
verbGlossary.PROTECTS SUPPLIERS OF: {source} ensures {target} suppliers are paid for materials furnished
verbGlossary.CERTIFIES WORKMANSHIP OF: {source} guarantees {target} installed work meets code and specification standards
verbGlossary.COVERS LOSS OF: {source} insures against damage or destruction of installed {target}
verbGlossary.COLLECTS SUBMITTALS FOR: {source} gathers product data, test reports, and as-built records for {target}
verbGlossary.SETS WAGE FLOOR FOR: {target} establishes minimum hourly rate for {source} on the project
verbGlossary.TRACKS COST GROWTH ON: {target} measures percentage of contract value added through changes for {source}
verbGlossary.MEASURES REBID RATE OF: {source} tracks how often {target} is re-engaged on projects
verbGlossary.GAUGES BID INTEREST FOR: {target} measures how many contractors submitted bids for {source} scope
verbGlossary.TALLIES COMPETITORS FOR: {source} counts competing proposals received for {target} scope
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKS LEAD TIME FOR: {source} tracks days from bid opening to award for {target}
verbGlossary.GUARANTEES MOBILIZATION OF: {source} financially guarantees the bidder will mobilize {target} if awarded
verbGlossary.COUNTS PARTICIPATION OF: {source} tallies dollar value of work by {target}
verbGlossary.AUDITS COVERAGE FOR: {source} checks whether {target} carries required policy limits

_meta.universalEdgeSemantics: Each universalEdge means: the source element connects to EVERY element in the targetGroup via the specified verb. targetGroup values: 'trades' (25 elements), 'equipment' (11 elements), 'materials' (25 elements), 'measures' (9 elements).
_meta.dataEvidence: Contracts and procurement instruments apply to all resource categories by construction industry definition — every trade is bid, contracted, invoiced, and warranted; every material is specified, ordered, delivered, and warranted.
_meta.edgesVsUniversal: The 'edges' array contains SELECTIVE relationships — operator-specific certifications, CXA-specific master service agreements, crane-specific insurance, surveyor-specific completion milestones, and other role-specific connections.
